title: cynoglossum coechinatum
intro: Cynoglossum coelchinatum, also known as the Chinese forget-me-not or blue pod, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used in Asian medicine to treat various ailments. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal issues, as well as reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Cynoglossum coelchinatum can be made into teas, capsules, or infusions, and are often used to treat colds, bronchitis, and other respiratory infections, as well as to support immune function and overall health.
